name: fleet operations supervisors managing 5–15 vehicles tool
description: For fleet operations supervisors managing 5–15 vehicles, inconsistent scheduling causes vehicle breakdowns. We automate scheduling and tracking instead of manual tracking through spreadsheets or paper logs.
problem_solved: Inconsistent scheduling of preventative maintenance leads to vehicle breakdowns.
features: simple dashboard for tracking maintenance history
